markers: constants.ts contains the main tutorial-style knowledge base data: 3 chapters in modulesData, plus on-call schedules, conferences, surgical cases, and changelog data.
iocData.ts contains 15 IOC caseArchitect entries across 2 surgical service lines, with histologic descriptions and sketch text for each case.
components/KnowledgeBase.tsx and components/IOCGuidedModals.tsx render the tutorial content from constants.ts and iocData.ts.
No standalone lecture corpus, algorithm lesson set, or local educational image asset folder was found.
The only image file hits are third-party package assets under node_modules, which are not source content.

summary.notes: This project is primarily an operational dashboard. The reusable educational payload lives in TypeScript data files rather than in separate lecture or image repositories.

tutorials.kind: knowledge base and reference manual data
tutorials.evidence: Defines modulesData with 3 chapters plus content strings for frozen-section guidance.
Defines 15 caseArchitect tutorial entries across 2 service lines, including histologic descriptions and sketch annotations.

dependencies: App.tsx wires the tutorial surfaces into the dashboard and routes to KnowledgeBase and IOC views.
components/KnowledgeBase.tsx consumes modulesData and passes IOC content to components/IOCGuidedModals.tsx.
components/IOCGuidedModals.tsx depends on iocData.ts for case/tutorial rendering.
services/predictionService.ts reads modulesData to influence consult-likelihood scoring, but it is an algorithmic workflow dependency rather than content itself.
recommendation: Migrate constants.ts and iocData.ts first if you want reusable tutorial content; there is no separate lecture set or local image corpus to stage from this repo.
